allowed_claims.allowed_wording: The DEU production chains support a scoped internal posterior summary for the full-objective working-lock configuration.
allowed_claims.required_caveat: This is internal/staged and not a final publication claim.

allowed_claims.allowed_wording: A matched DEU/native posterior comparison was recorded descriptively for shared parameters and DEU-only shape parameters.
allowed_claims.required_caveat: Descriptive posterior comparison is not model evidence or superiority.

allowed_claims.allowed_wording: Both DEU and native/baseline chains passed their readiness gates under the project-defined diagnostics.
allowed_claims.required_caveat: Readiness gates are internal validation criteria, not external evidence metrics.

allowed_claims.allowed_wording: TT_lite was monitored diagnostically and excluded from the sampled production likelihoods.
allowed_claims.required_caveat: Do not say TT_lite was included in the sampled posterior.

allowed_claims.allowed_wording: The tri-anchor ledger remains part of the diagnostic context for the full-objective working lock.
allowed_claims.required_caveat: The full-objective working lock is the production seed; high-l and lowl+TTTEEE anchors are monitoring sentinels.

baseline_matching_requirements.detail: DEU and native/baseline must use matched full-objective likelihood components.
TT_lite remains diagnostic-only unless both comparison runs explicitly include it.
All Planck masks/crops/ranges must match between comparison arms.
A_planck and fixed cosmological/nuisance settings must be justified and matched where appropriate.
Evidence design must account for beta and p_vis as DEU-only parameters.
Comparison can only use runs that pass their readiness/evidence diagnostics.
Existing scoped posterior summaries cannot be upgraded to model-superiority claims without the new comparison stage.

blocked_claims.blocked_wording: DEU is superior to the native/baseline model.
blocked_claims.reason: Requires explicit evidence/model-selection execution, not just posterior/readiness/descriptive comparison.
blocked_claims.unblock_requirement: Run and book a matched evidence/model-selection stage with predeclared metrics.

blocked_claims.blocked_wording: A Bayes factor/evidence value favors DEU.
blocked_claims.reason: No evidence/Bayes-factor calculation has been executed or booked.
blocked_claims.unblock_requirement: Run an explicit evidence estimator or approved proxy with matched priors/likelihoods.

blocked_claims.blocked_wording: This is a final publication-ready cosmological result.
blocked_claims.reason: Stage 3B-20 is a scoped internal report and final publication claims remain gated.
blocked_claims.unblock_requirement: Complete evidence/model-selection, prior sensitivity, and external robustness gates.

blocked_claims.blocked_wording: TT_lite was included in the sampled production posterior.
blocked_claims.reason: TT_lite was diagnostic-only and explicitly excluded from sampled production likelihoods.
blocked_claims.unblock_requirement: Run a later sampler that explicitly includes TT_lite and book its readiness gate.

blocked_claims.blocked_wording: The DEU hooks prove a physical mechanism or solve the cosmological problem.
blocked_claims.reason: The current artifacts are model/posterior diagnostics, not physical proof or external validation.
blocked_claims.unblock_requirement: Run theory-level validation, external-data checks, and model-selection analysis.

design_manifest.next_stage_hint: Stage 3B-22 evidence/model-selection estimator setup or matched evidence preflight
design_manifest.recommendation: Book Stage 3B-21. Next run an explicit evidence/model-selection preflight or estimator setup before any model-superiority, Bayes-factor, or publication-style claim.

design_matrix.claim_not_unlocked: physical proof or TT_lite inclusion unless explicitly sampled
design_matrix.claim_unlocked_if_passes: Bayes-factor/evidence language, still caveated by prior dependence
design_matrix.mcmc_required: not necessarily; use nested sampler/evidence estimator
design_matrix.must_match: likelihood set, nuisance treatment, data masks, priors/scopes, chain/evidence tolerances
design_matrix.purpose: Compute matched log evidence for DEU and native/baseline under the same likelihood family.

design_matrix.claim_not_unlocked: Bayes factor or model superiority by itself
design_matrix.mcmc_required: already partly available, but estimator validity must be audited
design_matrix.must_match: effective parameter count definition, loglike components, chain quality, posterior weights
design_matrix.purpose: Compute descriptive AIC/BIC/DIC/WAIC-like summaries from matched posterior chains if available.

design_matrix.claim_not_unlocked: final publication claim without external validation
design_matrix.must_match: prior families for shared parameters and DEU-only beta/p_vis treatment
design_matrix.purpose: Assess whether any evidence/comparison result is stable under reasonable prior-width choices.

design_matrix.claim_not_unlocked: retroactive TT_lite inclusion for current production posterior
design_matrix.claim_unlocked_if_passes: TT_lite-included posterior claims for that new run only
design_matrix.mcmc_required: yes, if sampled posterior claims are desired
design_matrix.must_match: TT_lite inclusion on both DEU and native/baseline sides or a justified diagnostic-only design
design_matrix.purpose: Run an explicit sampled likelihood configuration including TT_lite if TT_lite posterior language is desired.

design_matrix.claim_not_unlocked: evidence/Bayes factor unless evidence is computed
design_matrix.must_match: external data handling, masks, priors, likelihood code, comparison metric
design_matrix.purpose: Check whether posterior/model comparison survives a data split or external dataset.

required_evidence_artifacts.description: Defines identical DEU/native likelihood components and explicitly states TT_lite status.
Defines shared native parameters and DEU-only beta/p_vis prior treatment.
Specifies nested/evidence estimator, stopping criteria, seeds, and outputs.
Native/baseline evidence or approved comparison run.
DEU evidence or approved comparison run using matched settings.
Independent repeat or estimator uncertainty sufficient to support any comparison.
Shows comparison is not an artifact of arbitrary prior widths.
Maps evidence outputs to allowed and blocked external claims.

timeline_recap.claim_status: posterior interpretation unlocked, summary not yet written
robustness passed, final claims still gated
native comparison ready, superiority still gated
descriptive comparison written, superiority still gated
internal scoped report complete, evidence/model-selection still required
design/preflight only; final claims still gated
